chapter_title.en: HADEETH OF ABU BASEER WITH THE WOMAN

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 247)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5 / 247)

parts.text: عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (عليه السلام) إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَنَّ عَلَيْنَا بِأَنْ عَرَّفَنَا تَوْحِيدَهُ ثُمَّ مَنَّ عَلَيْنَا بِأَنْ أَقْرَرْنَا بِمُحَمَّدٍ (صلى الله عليه وآله) بِالرِّسَالَةِ ثُمَّ اخْتَصَّنَا بِحُبِّكُمْ أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ نَتَوَلَّاكُمْ وَ نَتَبَرَّأُ مِنْ عَدُوِّكُمْ وَ إِنَّمَا نُرِيدُ بِذَلِكَ خَلَاصَ أَنْفُسِنَا مِنَ النَّارِ قَالَ وَ رَقَقْتُ فَبَكَيْتُ

فَقَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (عليه السلام) سَلْنِي فَوَ اللَّهِ لَا تَسْأَلُنِي عَنْ شَيْ‏ءٍ إِلَّا أَخْبَرْتُكَ بِهِ قَالَ فَقَالَ لَهُ عَبْدُ الْمَلِكِ بْنُ أَعْيَنَ مَا سَمِعْتُهُ قَالَهَا لِمَخْلُوقٍ قَبْلَكَ قَالَ قُلْتُ خَبِّرْنِي عَنِ الرَّجُلَيْنِ قَالَ ظَلَمَانَا حَقَّنَا فِي كِتَابِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ مَنَعَا فَاطِمَةَ (صلوات الله عليها) مِيرَاثَهَا مِنْ أَبِيهَا وَ جَرَى ظُلْمُهُمَا إِلَى الْيَوْمِ قَالَ وَ أَشَارَ إِلَى خَلْفِهِ وَ نَبَذَا كِتَابَ اللَّهِ وَرَاءَ ظُهُورِهِمَا.

en.hubeali: H 14522 – Al-Husayn Bin Muhammad Al-Ashary, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al-Washa, from Abaan Bin Usmaan, from Abdul Rahmaan Bin Abu Abdullah who said:

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws that, ‘Allahazwj Bestowed (Favour) upon us that we recognised Hisazwj Oneness, then Bestowed (Favour) upon us that we accepted the Prophet-hood of Muhammadsaww, then Specialised us with yourasws love, the Peopleasws of the Household that we befriended you, and keep away from yourasws enemies, and we intend by that to save ourselves from the Fire’. He (the narrator) said, ‘And I sympathised with him and cried’.

So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Ask me<sup>asws</sup>, for by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, you will not ask me<sup>asws</sup> about a thing except that I<sup>asws</sup> will inform you of it’. He (the narrator) said, ‘Abdul Malik Bin Ayn, ‘I have not heard him<sup>asws</sup> say that to any creature before you’. I said, ‘Inform me about the two men (Abu Bakr and Umar)’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘They were unjust to us<sup>asws</sup> of our<sup>asws</sup> rights in the Book of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and with us<sup>asws</sup> Fatima<sup>asws</sup>, the inheritance from her<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>saww</sup>, and the injustices of these two still flow up to this day’. He (the narrator) said, ‘And he gestured to his<sup>asws</sup> back’, (and said): ‘They threw the Book of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> behind their two backs’.
en.sarwar: 74. Al-Husayn Bin Muhammad Al-Ashary, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al-Washa, from Abaan Bin Usmaan, from Abdul Rahmaan Bin Abu Abdullah who said: ‘I said to Abu Abdullah (a.s.) that, ‘Allah (azwj) Bestowed (Favour) upon us that we recognised His (azwj) Oneness, then Bestowed (Favour) upon us that we accepted the Prophet-hood of Muhammad (saww), then Specialised us with your (a.s.) love, the People (a.s.) of the Household that we befriended you, and keep away from your (a.s.) enemies, and we intend by that to save ourselves from the Fire’. He (the narrator) said, ‘And I sympathised with him and cried’. So Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said: ‘Ask me (a.s.), for by Allah (azwj), you will not ask me (a.s.) about a thing except that I (a.s.) will inform you of it’. He (the narrator) said, ‘Abdul Malik Bin Ayn, ‘I have not heard him (a.s.) say that to any creature before you’. I said, ‘Inform me about the two men (Abu Bakr and Umar)’. He (a.s.) said: ‘They were unjust to us (a.s.) of our (a.s.) rights in the Book of Allah (azwj), and with us (a.s.) Fatima (a.s.), the inheritance from her (a.s.) father (saww), and the injustices of these two still flow up to this day’. He (the narrator) said, ‘And he gestured to his (a.s.) back’, (and said): ‘They threw the Book of Allah (azwj) behind their two backs’.
